steps.name: Step 0: Build with Forge
steps.description: Run forge build to compile the project

steps.name: Step 1: Extract Target Functions
steps.description: Extract all targeted functions from the fuzzing suite using the extract_target_functions.py script

steps.name: Step 2: Build Artifacts
steps.description: Generate Forge build artifacts with build-info

steps.name: Step 3: Filter Build Artifacts
steps.description: Filter build-info to remove sources without AST data (foundry-pp files)

steps.name: Step 4: Extract Context with sol-expand
steps.description: Run sol-context tool to extract context from filtered build artifacts

steps.name: Step 5: Identifying Meaningful Values
steps.description: Identify values that are useful for clamping target function handlers with
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/coverage-phase-0.md. Exclusively run the coverage-phase-0 agent to identify values useful for clamping.

steps.name: Step 6: Creating Clamped Handlers
steps.description: Implement clamped function handlers to achieve full coverage on the system setup
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/coverage-phase-1.md. Exclusively run the coverage-phase-1 agent to implement clamped handlers

steps.name: Step 7: Generate Non-Reverting Paths
steps.description: Extract non-reverting paths through target functions and move to magic directory
steps.prompt: forge clean && forge build --build-info && npx -y recon-generate@latest paths && mkdir -p magic && mv recon-paths.json magic/

steps.name: Step 8: Identifying Function Call Sequences
steps.description: Identify necessary function call sequences and prerequisites for target functions
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/setup-phase-1.md. Exclusively run the setup-phase-1 agent to identify function call sequences

steps.name: Step 9: Merge Paths and Prerequisites
steps.description: Merge paths and prerequisites into a unified structure for each target function

steps.name: Step 10: Creating Shortcut Handlers
steps.description: Implement shortcut handlers that allow the fuzzer to reach coverage faster.
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/coverage-phase-2.md. Exclusively run the coverage-phase-2 agent to implement shortcut functions

steps.name: Step 11: Run Echidna Programmatically
steps.description: Run Echidna programmatically and capture output
steps.prompt: (set -o pipefail; echidna . --contract CryticTester --config echidna.yaml --format text --timeout 1800 --test-limit 99999999999999999999 --disable-slither --test-mode exploration 2>&1 | tee echidna-output.log; echo "ECHIDNA_EXIT_CODE=$?" > echidna-exit-code.txt) || true

steps.name: Step 12: Analyze Echidna Output
steps.description: Analyze Echidna execution results and determine next action

steps.name: Step 13: Handle Echidna Results
steps.description: Take action based on Echidna analysis results

decision.NOTE: Echidna ran successfully, skip error handling and continue workflow
Echidna failed, need to check error type

steps.name: Step 14: Check Error Type
steps.description: Determine if error is compilation-related

decision.NOTE: Compilation error detected, triggering fix agent
Non-compilation error detected (unlinked_libraries, setup, rpc, etc.), stopping workflow

steps.name: Step 15: Fix Compilation Errors
steps.description: Resolve compilation errors in the fuzzing harness
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/fix-compilation-errors.md. The file magic/echidna-error-analysis.json contains details about the compilation error. Exclusively run the fix-compilation-errors agent to resolve the compilation issues, then jump back to Step 11 to retry Echidna.

steps.name: Step 16: Generate Functions to Cover
steps.description: Generate list of functions that need coverage and move to magic directory
steps.prompt: forge clean && forge build --build-info && npx -y recon-generate@latest coverage && mkdir -p magic && mv recon-coverage.json magic/

steps.name: Step 17: Evaluate Coverage
steps.description: Evaluate coverage for functions in recon-coverage.json

steps.name: Step 18: Score and Sort by Complexity
steps.description: Add cyclomatic complexity scores to missing coverage functions and sort by complexity (auto-generates complexity data if needed)

steps.name: Step 19: Create Latest Coverage Link
steps.description: Find the most recent coverage file and create a -latest.json copy for decision steps

steps.name: Step 20: Initial Check of Coverage
steps.description: Determine if coverage needs to be improved

decision.NOTE: Full coverage achieved, skip to completion

steps.name: Step 21: Function Grouping and Prioritization
steps.description: Group uncovered functions and prioritize how they should be fixed using the functions-missing-covg file
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/coverage-phase-3.md. Exclusively run the coverage-phase-3 agent to analyze coverage gaps and prioritize how they should be fixed in the functions-missing-covg file

steps.name: Step 22: Analyzing Coverage Gaps
steps.description: Analyze coverage gaps and document the root causes by adding analysis field to functions-missing-covg file
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/coverage-phase-4.md. Exclusively run the coverage-phase-4 agent to identify the root cause for coverage gaps based on the analysis field in the functions-missing-covg file

steps.name: Step 23: Implement Coverage Solutions
steps.description: Implement solutions to improve coverage based on the analysis from coverage-phase-4
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/coverage-phase-5.md. Exclusively run the coverage-phase-5 agent to implement solutions that will improve coverage

steps.name: Step 24: Run Echidna Programmatically
steps.description: Run Echidna programmatically and capture output
steps.prompt: (set -o pipefail; echidna . --contract CryticTester --config echidna.yaml --format text --timeout 1800 --test-limit 99999999999999999999 --disable-slither --test-mode exploration 2>&1 | tee echidna-output.log; echo "ECHIDNA_EXIT_CODE=$?" > echidna-exit-code.txt) || true

steps.name: Step 25: Analyze Echidna Output
steps.description: Analyze Echidna execution results and determine next action

steps.name: Step 26: Handle Echidna Results
steps.description: Take action based on Echidna analysis results

decision.NOTE: Echidna ran successfully, skip error handling and continue workflow
Echidna failed, need to check error type

steps.name: Step 27: Check Error Type
steps.description: Determine if error is compilation-related

decision.NOTE: Compilation error detected, triggering fix agent
Non-compilation error detected (unlinked_libraries, setup, rpc, etc.), stopping workflow

steps.name: Step 28: Fix Compilation Errors
steps.description: Resolve compilation errors in the fuzzing harness
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/fix-compilation-errors.md. The file magic/echidna-error-analysis.json contains details about the compilation error. Exclusively run the fix-compilation-errors agent to resolve the compilation issues, then jump back to Step 21 to retry Echidna.

steps.name: Step 29: Evaluate Coverage
steps.description: Run coverage evaluation tool

steps.name: Step 30: Score and Sort by Complexity
steps.description: Add cyclomatic complexity scores to missing coverage functions and sort by complexity (auto-generates complexity data if needed)

steps.name: Step 31: Create Latest Coverage Link
steps.description: Find the most recent coverage file and create a -latest.json copy for decision steps

steps.name: Step 32: Coverage Improvement Decision Check
steps.description: Check if coverage needs to be improved

decision.NOTE: Loop back to Step 18 to continue with coverage improvement
Full coverage achieved, proceed to workflow completion

steps.name: Step 33: Dispatch Fuzzing Job
steps.description: Queue a 10 MLN TestEchidna fuzzing job with the backend.

steps.name: Step 34: Workflow Complete
steps.description: Workflow has completed successfully - full coverage achieved or no coverage gaps detected
